zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun於大約1328年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾拉斯時，他的父親Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk49歲，母親Lady Helen Catherine Graham55歲。他和Luss - Heiress of Luss至少有4個兒子。他去世於1391年之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Colquhoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Colquhoun in Dumbartonshire. The name appears to derive from Gaelic còil, cùil ‘nook, corner’, or coill(e) ‘wood’ + cumhann ‘narrow’. The usual Scottish pronunciation is ka-hoon. This is the name of a Scottish family descended from Umfridus de Kilpatrick, who acquired lands in the barony of Colquhoun during the reign of Alexander II (1214–49).

variants.name: Cohoon
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Scottish: variant of   Colquhoun  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Calhoun
meanings: History: This prominent early American name was brought across the Atlantic Ocean by Scotch-Irish pioneers who entered Pennsylvania c. 1733. The American statesman John c. Calhoun (1782–1850), born in Abbeville District, SC, served in both houses of Congress, was secretary of war, and vice president of the US (1825–32).

variants.name: Cahoon
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): variant (reflecting the traditional pronunciation) of Scottish   Colquhoun  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun was born about 1328, in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk, was 49 and his mother, Lady Helen Catherine Graham, was 55. He had at least 4 sons with Luss - Heiress of Luss. He died before 1391, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun est né environ 1328, à Luss, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Lady Helen Catherine Graham, avait 55 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Luss - Heiress of Luss. Il est décédé avant 1391, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun um 1328 in Luss, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk 49 und seine Mutter Lady Helen Catherine Graham 55. Er hatte mit Luss - Heiress of Luss mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1391 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun è nato il circa 1328 nel Luss, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Lady Helen Catherine Graham, aveva 55 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Luss - Heiress of Luss. Morì prima del 1391, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhounが約1328年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアルスで生まれた時，父Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilkは49歳，母Lady Helen Catherine Grahamは55歳であった。彼はLuss - Heiress of Lussとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1391年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun(이)가 대략 1328년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Helen Catherine Graham(은)는 55세였다. 그는 Luss - Heiress of Luss(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1391년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun nasceu aproximadamente 1328, em Luss, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Lady Helen Catherine Graham, tinha 55 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Luss - Heiress of Luss. Ele faleceu antes 1391, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun родился около 1328 г. в местности лусс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Helen Catherine Graham, 55. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Luss - Heiress of Luss. Он умер перед 1391 г. в его родном городе.
